nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: Robert FitzPicot II was born in 1051, in Sai, Orne, Lower Normandy, France. He had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Adelaide de Beaumont. He died on 4 June 1086, in Clun, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Robert FitzPicot II est né en 1051, à Sai, Orne, Basse-Normandie, France. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Adelaide de Beaumont. Il est décédé le 4 juin 1086, à Clun, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Robert FitzPicot II wurde 1051 in Sai, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich geboren. Er hatte mit Adelaide de Beaumont mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 4. Juni 1086 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Clun, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Robert FitzPicot II è nato il nel 1051 nel Sai, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Adelaide de Beaumont. Morì il 4 giugno 1086, nel Clun, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert FitzPicot IIは1051年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディオルンサイで生まれた。彼はAdelaide de Beaumontとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1086年6月4日にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアクルンで35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert FitzPicot II(은)는 1051년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 른 사이에서 태어났다. 그는 Adelaide de Beaumont(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1086년 6월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 클루에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Robert FitzPicot II родился в 1051 г. в местности сеи, орн, бассе-норманди, Франция. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Adelaide de Beaumont. Он умер 4 июня 1086 г. в местности клун, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 35 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Robert FitzPicot II nació en 1051, en Sai, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con Adelaide de Beaumont. Murió el 4 de junio de 1086, en Clun, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 35 años.
